2606.30887.title: Training Therapeutic Judges and Multi-Agent Systems for Human-Aligned Mental Health Support
2606.30887.paper_summary: Large language models show promise for mental health support, yet therapeutic quality improves only when evaluation functions as an actionable control signal rather than a passive metric. We introduce a framework that formulates therapeutic response generation as a decision-refinement problem driven by multi-dimensional, human-aligned evaluation. In Stage I, we introduce TheraJudge, an open-source therapeutic evaluator trained via preference-based optimization on human-annotated data to produce reliable judgments across 7 psychological dimensions. In Stage II, we introduce TheraAgent, which operationalizes TheraJudge's evaluations through a coordinated refinement process with specialized Critic, Coach, and Therapist roles that translate evaluative signals into targeted response revisions. Empirically, TheraJudge achieves strong agreement with clinician ratings, with intraclass correlation coefficients (ICC = 0.87-0.95), surpassing supervised baselines and strong closed-source judges, particularly on critical dimensions such as Safety, Relevance, and Empathy. Acting on these evaluations, TheraAgent yields a +0.43 improvement in human-rated therapeutic quality (on a 5-point scale) under blind evaluation, with 96\% clinician inter-rater reliability. Low-quality responses ($\leq 3$) improve by +2.45 points with a 94\% recovery rate, demonstrating targeted correction of unsafe outputs. Overall, our results indicate that effective alignment of mental-health LLMs stems from acting on human-aligned evaluation, rather than relying solely on stronger generation. We release code at https://github.com/vis-nlp/TheraAlign.
2606.30887.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型在心理健康支持方面顯示出潛力，但只有當評估作為可行的控制信號而非被動的指標時，治療質量才會改善。我們介紹了一個框架，將治療反應生成公式化為一個由多維度、人類對齊評估驅動的決策精煉問題。在第一階段，我們介紹了TheraJudge，一個開源的治療評估器，通過基於偏好的優化在人工標註數據上進行訓練，以在7個心理維度上產生可靠的判斷。在第二階段，我們介紹了TheraAgent，該系統通過與專門的批評者、教練和治療師角色的協調精煉過程，將TheraJudge的評估轉化為針對性的反應修訂。實證結果顯示，TheraJudge與臨床醫生的評分達成強一致性，類內相關係數（ICC = 0.87-0.95）超過了監督基準和強閉源評估者，特別是在安全性、相關性和同理心等關鍵維度上。根據這些評估，TheraAgent在盲評下實現了人類評定的治療質量提高了+0.43（在5分制上），臨床醫生的評分者間可靠性達到96\%。低質量反應（$\leq 3$）改善了+2.45分，恢復率達94\%，顯示出對不安全輸出的針對性修正。總體而言，我們的結果表明，心理健康大型語言模型的有效對齊源於對人類對齊評估的行動，而非僅僅依賴更強的生成。我們在 https://github.com/vis-nlp/TheraAlign 上發布代碼。
2606.30887.author: Mizanur Rahman et.al.
2606.30887.authors: Mizanur Rahman, Abeer Badawi, Elahe Rahimi, Laleh Seyyed-Kalantari, Frank Rudzicz, Enamul Hoque, Elham Dolatabadi
